name: ARCHER W3

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C9DAC871-C450-4822-A834-8BF6380F34D8

comment:
Basic Moving Head Wash 7x40w: Four dimmer curves, versatile "thungsten" and "CMY" channel lists,
plus/minus green control, variable source refresh rate,
and a silent cooling system: advanced features designed
specifically for broadcast and theater. Thanks to extreme zoom,
single-pixel control, rapid movements, and the precision
of LED sources, the ARCHER W3 and W8 are the perfect choice for
the most demanding lighting designers.

capabilities.comment: Minus green from no green removed to Max green removed
Rainbow color from slow to fast (from the first to the last color)
Rainbow color from slow to fast (from the first to the last color)
Chase forward from fast to slow
Chase forward from slow to fast
Minus green from no green removed to Max green removed
